use_codes.desc: REDUCTION OF CARDIAC TISSUE DAMAGE ASSOCIATED WITH MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION

indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
MICARDIS is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure reduces the risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular
events, primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been seen in controlled trials of antihypertensiv...

1.1 Hypertension
MICARDIS is indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may be used alone or in combination with other antihypertensive agents [see Clinical Studies (14.1)].
